violations.text: The entrance door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
Refrigerator door gasket of the 2-door reach-in observed in poor repair, split away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
The condensate from the ice machine is draining into the handsink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The entrance door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the 2-door reach-in observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

Beverage tubing and cold plate observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice for drinks. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
